text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: …My dream.

text_block_list.name: Commentator
text_block_list.text:
Symboli Rudolf! Symboli Rudolf comes up from the inside! 
Rudolf is coming! The undefeated Triple Crown Horsegirl is here, right now—!

text_block_list.name: Commentator
text_block_list.text: Symboli Rudolf takes the Triple Crown! She's achieved the Triple Crown!! An immortal record! For this Horsegirl who has decided to win, there is an "absolute"!!

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: Ever since I saw that Horsegirl. Ever since then, I—!!

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
Mmf… Ngh… Mmm—? 
Yaaawn… What time is it…

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: 3 AM!?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
…Mnyam. Is something the matter…? 
Dear Tsuru～

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
N-Nothing! I'm sorry! 
I just suddenly woke up…

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
(Ugh～ Why at this time of all times? 
Does lacking stamina mean I can't even sleep～!?)

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
(Urgh… I need to sleep! Go to sleep!! 
Sleeping is part of training, after all! Plus today—!)
A few days have passed since the selection race. As if to fill the gap in knowledge I couldn't gain that day, I've spent days gathering information on the Horsegirls. However—
The face of the Horsegirl who missed her chance that day, just like me, won't leave my mind. Guilt and regret. …Such disrespectful emotions swirl within me.

text_block_list.name: Senior Trainer
text_block_list.text: You're becoming quite the rumor around here～! They're saying you're a really motivated rookie! Doing all that research on the Horsegirls and showing up to study sessions!

text_block_list.name: Senior Trainer
text_block_list.text: So I'll give you a special piece of info. The girls from the generation that ran in the selection race the other day… Apparently, they're at the training track right now!

I hurriedly run over to the stands at the training track. They're not on the turf… They're not on the dirt either. 
That leaves—

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
Oh, from the other day… 
Are you here to observe, Trainer?
choice_data_list: <size=32>…! Y-Yeah! I heard your generation was running…</size>
<size=32>…! Y-Yeah! I heard your generation was running…</size>

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
Then right this way, over here! 
Spe and the others are at the hill slope!
Led by the hand by Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi, we move to a spot with a good view of the slope. Two of the girls I had my eye on earlier were currently running side-by-side.

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: Wow～～! Looks like they're going to set another great time～～! What do you think!? From a trainer's perspective, how do those two look!?

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: …? Trainer?
choice_data_list: <size=30>Actually… I was wondering if you were going to run too</size>
<size=30>Actually… I was wondering if you were going to run too</size>

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: M-Me…!? Wha!? …Whoa～～!?

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
Should I run!? I'll go change right now! 
If it's mental training, I can easily do 3000m—Hk!? Gweh!!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Heeey, Tsuru! Weren't you supposed to be resting your body until today! Ah… Should I bring you some water?
The "Emperor," Tokai Teio. Among the classic Triple Crown route, she's won the 『Satsuki Sho』 and the 『Japanese Derby』, making her a "Two-Crown Horsegirl"!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Heeey, you! Tsuru is a fellow President fanatic, just like me! Please don't push her too hard～

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: Haah… Haah… Ehehe, truth is, we both look up to President Symboli Rudolf…

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: Have you ever seen it, Trainer? The moment President Rudolf became the undefeated Triple Crown Horsegirl!
choice_data_list: <size=38>Yeah, I remember that incredible feat too</size>
<size=38>Yeah, I remember that incredible feat too</size>

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: Right!? I mean, she was just so "strong"… Truly a masterpiece. Even though I'd watched so many other Horsegirl races before then—

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: —I couldn't help but dream. I wanted to be like her. I wanted to follow in her footsteps… To be the kind of "Triple Crown Horsegirl" that carries on her legacy—

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
…Tsuru asked the President too! 
She said she wanted to run with her!

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, yeah, even though I hadn't even come into my own yet. 
…But the President even invited me to run side-by-side. We took turns—!

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
Ah!! That's right, the video from back then!! Um, Trainer. 
I can show you my running through that video!!

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: I was in perfect health at the time! So I actually ran pretty well. Here's the video… Would you like to watch it?

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: If you don't mind, absolutely! It's from a while ago, so my running is rougher than it is now, though.
—I was captivated by the footage.

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: Ehehe, what do you think? She held back a lot for me, but… Still, even a little! It looks pretty good, right!

What captivated me wasn't just her high level of talent. 
It was her attitude when facing Symboli Rudolf.

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
"Hah… Ahahaha—! 
Not yet… I'm not done yeeet!!"
—I've heard rumors. That Symboli Rudolf was so overwhelmingly strong, her running partners would feel the difference so acutely it brought them to despair. But, she…

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
『Here I go, President!! 
I can still—keep going!! —Oooooooooohhhhh!!』
Watching her run, brimming with instinct and potential, my true feelings slip out. Pure admiration… Just my honest thoughts.
choice_data_list: <size=38>I really want to see more of your races…!</size>
<size=38>I really want to see more of your races…!</size>

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: If you're that interested in each other, why don't you and Tsuru sign a provisional contract?

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
Huh!? Teio!? 
No, no, the Trainer is busy, so…

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: Eeehk!? A-Are you sure…?
